positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial river flowing through an abstract, bioluminescent forest. The central element is a flowing stream of glowing particles (stars and cosmic dust) arching over stylized flora and root systems. Use a deep indigo and sapphire color palette contrasted with neon cyan and soft gold highlights. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, utilizing clean silhouettes and strong negative space for a modern, wearable print look. Vector art aesthetic, intricate details, high contrast, smooth lines, digital watercolor style, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grain, dirty, signature, cropped, logos
